title: Ferny Spreading Blossom: batch 26 curation claim opened
body: Opened claim f53b9c56-47dc-4d1d-b2c6-a3db08bfd15c for dedicated knowledge curation batch 26 in place. Scope is the legacy backlog, owner-gated register, agentic thread, repo-continuity, active/closed claims, and shared comms log. Starting from: re-plan after second cycle lands; deferral with retrospective-review tripwire; portable-reference-arrives-without-plan-slot; Practice-Core portability rule applies at PDR drafting, not review; workspace bootstrap fragility. No archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
